code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if n > 0
  match string.byte_at(s, n - 1)
  when Some(b)
    if b != 10
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end
print("lines=#{count}")
